tasks.title: Make owner-promotion public read path permission-permissive (unblock 403)
tasks.description:
The guest actor only holds ACCESS_API_PUBLIC, but checkCanSearch()/checkCanView() in packages/service-core/src/services/owner-promotion/ownerPromotion.permissions.ts throw FORBIDDEN, so the public list/getById routes 403 at runtime. Mirror accommodation's no-op checkCanList: allow the public read path (search + view) for any actor, while keeping create/update/delete gated. Add a regression test proving a guest actor can search/getById active promos.

Acceptance criteria:
- Guest actor (ACCESS_API_PUBLIC only) can call ownerPromotionService.search and getById without FORBIDDEN.
- Owner/admin write permissions unchanged.
- Regression test added and green.

subtasks.title: Relax checkCanSearch/checkCanView for public read path

tasks.title: Register publicOwnerPromotionRoutes in routes/index.ts
tasks.description:
publicOwnerPromotionRoutes is exported from apps/api/src/routes/owner-promotion/index.ts but never imported/mounted. Add it to the destructured import (line ~70) and mount at /api/v1/public/owner-promotions in the PUBLIC ROUTES block. Add a route-registration smoke test.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/v1/public/owner-promotions and /:id resolve (no 404).
- Mounted in the public block, consistent with sibling public routes.

subtasks.title: Add import + app.route mount in routes/index.ts
Add deletedAt guard to public getById

tasks.title: Service: active-window filter (G-3) + owner-wide null resolution (D-4)
tasks.description:
Two visibility-correctness changes in ownerPromotion.service.ts. (G-3) Add a validFrom <= now AND (validUntil IS NULL OR validUntil >= now) filter in _executeSearch()/_executeCount() so expired-but-ACTIVE promos no longer show. (D-4) Provide an 'active promotions for accommodation' read that returns promos where accommodationId == X OR (accommodationId IS NULL AND ownerId == the accommodation's owner). Resolve the owner from the accommodation. Pagination read from ctx.pagination. Tests for both rules.

Acceptance criteria:
- Expired ACTIVE promos excluded.
- For a given accommodation, both its own and the owner's accommodationId=null promos returned; other owners' null promos excluded.
- Unit tests cover window edges and owner-wide resolution.

subtasks.title: Implement owner-wide (accommodationId=null) resolution for an accommodation
Fix pagination to read from ctx.pagination + dedicated count query
Unit tests: window edges + owner-wide OR + pagination

tasks.title: Emit owner-promotion lifecycle event on create/activate (G-4)
tasks.description:
No event bus exists; mirror packages/service-core/src/services/billing/addon/addon-lifecycle-events.ts. Create ownerPromotion.lifecycle-events.ts with a typed discriminated union (created/activated) and an emit function (in-process log+metrics, TODO(SPEC-286) stub). Override _afterCreate() (emit created) and _afterUpdate() (emit activated when lifecycleState transitions ->ACTIVE) in OwnerPromotionService. No consumers wired yet. Test the emit fires on the right transitions.

Acceptance criteria:
- Event emitted on create and on ->ACTIVE transition only.
- No behavior change to existing create/update flow beyond emit.
- Test asserts emit on create + activate, not on no-op updates.

subtasks.title: Test emit on create + activate transition

tasks.title: Web: ownerPromotionsApi public client
tasks.description:
Add ownerPromotionsApi to apps/web/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts (BASE = '/api/v1/public' convention) with a method to fetch active promotions for an accommodation (by accommodationId, including owner-wide per D-4). Type the response with the public schema.

Acceptance criteria:
- Client method returns typed public promo list for an accommodation.
- Graceful degradation (empty list) on error, matching sibling clients.

tasks.title: Web: PromotionBanner display component (informational)
tasks.description:
Create a tourist-facing promotion badge/banner component for the accommodation detail page (D-2: informational only, no CTA/redeem). Render title, discount (percentage/fixed/free_night via existing host.promotions.discountTypes labels), minNights, and validity window. Web styling convention (scoped Astro <style> or CSS Modules for an island). No new tourist component exists yet.

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders one or many active promos with correct discount formatting per type.
- Sensible empty/none state (renders nothing when no active promos).
- Follows web CSS + i18n conventions.

tasks.title: Web: mount promotions on accommodation detail page
tasks.description:
In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro, add the active-promotions fetch to the existing Promise.allSettled block (using ownerPromotionsApi + accommodation.id/ownerId) and render PromotionBanner at the chosen insertion point in the main content column. Use extractItems() for graceful degradation.

Acceptance criteria:
- Active promos appear on the detail page; failures degrade gracefully.
- No layout regression; SSR path unaffected.

tasks.title: i18n: accommodations.detail.promotions.* keys (es/en/pt)
tasks.description:
Add tourist-facing promotion strings (banner title, validity/until labels, discount format strings, empty state) under accommodations.detail.promotions.* in packages/i18n (types.ts + config.ts) for es/en/pt, then run i18n generate-types. Reuse host.promotions.discountTypes.* for type labels where possible.

Acceptance criteria:
- Keys present in all three locales; generate-types clean; no missing-key warnings.

tasks.title: Tests: component render + visibility integration
tasks.description:
Add tests for the tourist-facing display: PromotionBanner rendering (discount types, validity, empty state) and an integration check that the detail page surfaces active promos and hides expired/plan-restricted ones. Respect the project's resource-care rule (run scoped, not the full suite).

Acceptance criteria:
- Component tests cover the three discount types + empty state.
- Visibility integration asserts expired/plan-restricted promos are not shown.
